examples: The accidental effects obtained by candid photographers were soon being copied by artists such as the French painter Degas.
Morisot and Degas moved in the same social circles.
The haul also included a Manet, several Degas sketches and three Rembrandts.
Works by Renoir, Degas, Monet and Edvard Munch and a sculpture by Modigliani were also sold.
Unfortunately for painters down through the centuries, the world is full of art patrons like Monsieur Degas'.
